titles.title: The Battle Belongs to the Lord

authors.author: Jamie Owens-Collins
Jamie Owens-Collins
Mit der göttlichen Kraft nehmen wir ein das Land (Dir sei Ehre, alle Macht)

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: In heavenly armour we'll enter the land The battle belongs to the Lord No weapon that's fashioned against us shall stand The battle belongs to the Lord

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: /: We sing glory and honor Power and strength to the Lord. :/

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: The power of darkness comes in like a flood The battle belongs to the Lord He's raised up a standard, the power of His blood The battle belongs to the Lord

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: When your enemy presses in hard do not fear The battle belongs to the Lord Take courage my friend, your redemption is near The battle belongs to the Lord
